title: 50 Pcs Zip Lock Bags, Food Storage Freezer Bags (2.27L) Reusable Sandwich Bags Food Storage Bags with Expandable Bottom, BPA Free Zip Seal Freezer Bags for Fruits, Vegetables, Meat, Grains
features: 【Package Includes】You will receive 50 pcs food storage freezer bags with a size of 23*6*22cm, which is sufficient quantity to satisfy your use for a long time.
【Reliable Material】Our reusable zip lock bags are made of PE material, which can be in direct contact with food, BPA-free, thick and durable.
【Zip Lock Seal Design】This food storage bag adopts a zip lock sealing design, which is easy to open and seal, making it more convenient to operate and use.

【Expandable Bottom】The food bag adopts a widened bottom design, which not only increases the capacity of the food bag, but also makes it easier to stand when the bag is full, making the refrigerator storage neater.

【Writable Area】The resealable zip lock bag is designed with a writeable area so you can mark the storage date, item name and other information. Zip lock bags can not only be used to store vegetables, fruits, meats, sandwiches and other food, but they can also be used to store toiletries, cosmetics, etc. when traveling.
description: Product Description Reusable Zip Lock Bags Specifications: Material: PE Size: As Shown Color: Transparent Package include: 50*Food Storage Freezer Bags Our zip seal food bag can withstand temperatures ranging from -20℃ to 110℃, which can be heated in Water heating or thawed by microwave (the time should not exceed 3 minutes). Tips: When heating in Water heating or thawing in the microwave oven, please open the bag mouth to reserve a gap to facilitate the discharge of water vapor. The sandwich bags are packaged in a box and features a pull-out bag taking design, making it convenient and fast to take out the bag. The transparent material of the zip seal food storage bag makes the food inside clearly visible and easy to access.
